text.title: product-explainability Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for product-explainability as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Feature-list trap: PMs default to listing what shipped instead of explaining what changed for the user; stakeholders nod, retain nothing, mis-sell.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Feature lists describe implementation, not value. "Added bulk-export API endpoint" tells a CSM nothing about what changes for their customer.

failure-mode.description: Translation collapse: PM speaks PM-ese; sales translates to sales-ese; CS translates again to customer-ese. Each translation drops a limit or invents a capability.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Eliminate hops with generated renders from one canonical source. Hand-editing any render is forbidden; diffs from the canonical source are the only allowed change.

failure-mode.description: Outcome-washing: "We shipped X, NPS went from 42 to 44" — correlation passed off as causation, no isolation, no instrumentation. Stakeholders learn to distrust PM data.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Correlation presented as causation teaches stakeholders to distrust PM data. isolation_method is a required field; unverified is the honest answer when you do not know.

failure-mode.description: Hero-narrative bias: PM owns the story so the PM looks good in it; engineering and design contributions disappear, internal trust erodes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force credit lines: "Designed by [name], engineered by [team]"; remove first-person voice from exec memo.

failure-mode.description: Stale story: The story is written at launch and never updated; six months later capabilities have changed but the deck has not, sales is selling vapor.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Refresh on every status flip. feature-narrative.json has a content hash checked against the current PRD and telemetry; stale narratives fail the gate before re-rendering.

failure-mode.description: Audience collapse: One artifact tries to serve exec, sales, support, customer, regulator at once; ends up serving none well.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Generate five renders from one source: exec memo, sales one-pager, support runbook, customer changelog, AI-KB delta. Each render is audience-optimized.

failure-mode.description: Limit-omission: Limits are perceived as "negative" and edited out before they reach sales; sales over-promises; CS absorbs the gap.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Limits are passed as a separate verbatim, never-summarized field. Each render is linted to confirm the limit string is present before publish.

failure-mode.description: AI-readability blindness: PMs write for humans only; the same LLM that just answered a customer's pre-sales question now misrepresents the product. PM owns this and most PMs do not realize it yet (2026 reality).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: In 2026, the AI render is a PM deliverable, not a marketing afterthought. Skipping it leaves the product misrepresented in the AI-mediated buying journey.

failure-mode.description: Storytelling vs. specification confusion: PMs hide ambiguity behind narrative ("delights users", "boosts productivity"); engineers re-derive specs from the story and ship the wrong thing.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Author with engineering, not after. PM drafts narrative during design phase; engineering reviews for accuracy of behavior_change. Catches scope drift early and prevents post-hoc invention.

failure-mode.description: Outcome inflation: Render agents will round 2.1% to "double-digit improvement" or extrapolate one cohort to "all users".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hard rule: render agent must echo measurable_outcome.metric + baseline + current verbatim; no rephrasing of numbers.

failure-mode.description: Limit erosion across renders: Translate-loop summarizes, summarization drops limits. Pass limits as a separate, verbatim, never-summarized field; lint each render to confirm the limit string is present.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each render is linted to confirm the limit string is present before publish.

failure-mode.description: Persona invention: Extractor agents will invent personas to fill affected_personas[] when input is sparse.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Anchor allowed personas to a registry (personas.json) and reject others.

failure-mode.description: Marketing-tone leakage: Even with banned-tokens lists, LLMs route around (top-tier, category-defining).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Maintain an evolving banned-token list; periodically have a second LLM lint for marketing tone.

failure-mode.description: Hero narrative bias: Generator favors PM-as-protagonist framing.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force credit lines: "Designed by [name], engineered by [team]"; remove first-person voice from exec memo.

failure-mode.description: Stale narrative re-publish: Cron-driven render re-runs without an extract refresh produce confidently-wrong artifacts after capability changes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always re-extract before re-rendering; never cache the narrative without a content hash check against PRD + telemetry.

failure-mode.description: Comprehension-probe gaming: Probe agent and render agent share weights → probe scores artificially high.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use a different model family for probe vs. render (e.g. render with Claude, probe with GPT-4 or Gemini).

failure-mode.description: Confidentiality leak: Narratives often expose unlaunched features, customer names, internal infra.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Run password-scrubber-agent before any render leaves engineering's repo.

failure-mode.description: AI-readability skipped: PM treats AI render as a marketing concern.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Wrong: the AI render feeds the operations-side KB and the next pre-sales conversation. Make the AI render mandatory, not optional.

failure-mode.description: Cross-locale drift: Translation agents helpfully soften limits ("does not support" → "is best for").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Localize structurally with per-locale render passes; never machine-translate limits.

failure-mode.description: Silent disagreement between extractor and engineering: If extractor reads PRD only and never reads the implementation diff, narrative drifts from reality.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Extractor must consume both PRD and recent commits; flag mismatches as agent-blocking.

failure-mode.description: Stakeholder feedback never closes the loop: Renders ship one-way; comprehension failures do not update the narrative.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Feed sales objections, support tickets, and AI-mis-answers back into the extractor as ground-truth signals; otherwise quality plateaus.
